title: SPUSEN Metal Shoe Rack, 10 Tier Shoe Storage Organizer with Hooks,Fit 40-45Pairs Shoes,Metal Tall Shoe Shelf for Closet,Entryway,Garage,Bedroom,Cloakroom
features: 10 Tier Large Capacity Shoe Rack: Size: 175x72x30cm, 10 Tier Shoe Rack can store 40-45 pairs of shoes various styles of shoes. Side hook provide extra space for bags, keys and umbrellas. It can maximize space saving and provide a comfortable and tidy home.

STABLE & DUST-PROOF: This high quality shoe rack is made of rust-resistant metal tubes and super strong reinforced frame, which prevents it from shaking or collapsing when full of shoes, and it won't shake or tip over when full of shoes. The non-woven layer prevents dust from falling off the top and is easy to clean.

EXPANDABLE DIY SHOE RACK: You can assemble and disassemble it freely according to your needs. You can drop two shoe racks to put together a bigger shoe rack to organize all the family members' shoes. You can also split the 10-tier shoe rack into 2 separate shoe racks for storage in different places. Perfect for your entryway, closet, closet, living room or garage
WIDELY USED: The standing shoe rack is great for organizing your flats, sneakers, heels, boots, booties, as well as bags, books, toys, boxes or other items.
EASY TO ASSEMBLE: The metal shoe rack comes with a detailed instruction manual. Easy to assemble without additional tools.
